examples: Objective to observe the effect of tracheoesophageal shunt on voice reconstruction after total laryngectomy.
Objective To evaluate the diagnostic value of helical ct in congenital esophageal atresia and tracheoesophageal fistula (CEA-TEF).
Objective To evaluate the value and effect of ct and radiotherapy in diagnosis of tracheoesophageal groove lymph node metastasis of esophageal cancer.
